summary: Excellent FM audience capture with a top‑three SOTM and blazing Jerry solo; recording is clear despite occasional broadcast noise.
review: The show is hailed as one of the best ever, highlighted by an unforgettable SOTM that lands in the top three and a raging final solo from Jerry. Recorded off a hotel‑room VCR tuned to the FM broadcast, the audio is surprisingly clean with only a faint high‑pitch hiss from the original transmission.

ai_rating.rationale: All five reviews are enthusiastic (4–5 stars) and praise both the performance (especially SOTM and Jerry's solo) and the surprisingly good FM/VCR capture, with only minor noise issues.

recording_quality.technical_notes: VCR‑captured FM broadcast from a hotel room; generally clear and listenable but includes a faint high‑pitch noise inherent to the original broadcast.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set is described as a blues‑heavy, fun jam with great band chemistry; overall pacing and energy are praised.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Final solo described as 'ragin'' and one of the best ever.
